title: Malty Crispy Italian Tortellini
description: A festive Italian dish featuring crispy tortellini with a malty flavor profile, courtesy of kombu-cold-extract and chickpea flour. Perfect for a comforting dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: lemon zest
ingredients.notes: from 1 lemon, remove excess with a fine grater

instructions: Combine chickpea flour and salt in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add kombu-cold-extract, water, and olive oil to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal parts, then roll each part out to a thickness of 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Use a round cookie cutter or a glass to cut out circles of dough.
Place a small spoonful of onion, garlic, and nutritional yeast mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Brush the edges of the dough with lemon juice and fold the dough in half to form a tortellino.
Press the edges together to seal the tortellino.
Fry the tortellini in hot olive oil until crispy and golden brown.
Drain excess oil on paper towels, then serve immediately.
To make the onion-garlic mixture, saut2 onion and garlic in a small pan until softened, then set aside to cool.
